entry.title: New IDC W56KGY17D0006 awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS MISSION SYSTEMS, INC for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: W4GV USA HQ COMM ELECT CMD

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF THIS 5 YEAR SINGLE SOURCE INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY CONTRACT IS AWARDED TO SUPPORT THE PROPHET ENHANCED/ MODIFICATION, TRAINING, AND SUPPORT OF FORTY-SEVEN (47) AN/MLQ-44A PREVIOUSLY FIELDED PROPHET ENHANCED (PE) SYSTEMS TO THE LATEST AN/MLQ-44B CONFIGURATION

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W56KGY17D0006 (P00001) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS MISSION SYSTEMS, INC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: W4GV USA HQ COMM ELECT CMD

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::CL,CT::IGF ESTABLISH RANGE PRICING FOR IDIRECTS AND MSIIIS ON A FIRM FIXED PRICE BASIS AND ESTABLISH A SET PRICE FOR IDIRECT MWO KITS ON A FIRM FIXED PRICE BASIS

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W56KGY17D0006 (P00002) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS MISSION SYSTEMS, INC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: W4GV USA HQ COMM ELECT CMD

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::CL,CT::IGF DELETE CLIN 0022 FROM THE BASE CONTRACT AND ISSUE A NEW CLIN FOR IDIRECT RANGE PRICING YEAR 1. CLIN 0022 HAS ALREADY BEEN CREATED UNDER DELIVERY ORDER 0001 FOR CONTRACTOR MANPOWER REPORTING. CLIN0037 HAS BEEN ESTABLISHED FOR THE IDIRECT RANGE PRICING YEAR 1.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W56KGY17D0006 (P00007) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS MISSION SYSTEMS, INC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: W4GV USA HQ COMM ELECT CMD

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REQUEST THAT YPG AUTHORIZE AND APPROVE DOD RATE FOR THE CONTRACTOR, GENERAL DYNAMICS MISSION SYSTEMS, TO OBTAIN TEST SUPPORT/SERVICES FROM MAJOR RANGE AND TEST FACILITY BASE (MRTFB) INSTALLATIONS AS GOVERNMENT FURNISHED SERVICES FOR THE (PROPHET) PTR PROGRAM FOR THE DURATION OF THIS CONTRACT, 15 JUNE 2023.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
